tweets.text: There are multiple major causes of people not having enough safe, healthy food to eat, including the “Triple C’s” of COVID-19, Conflict, and Climate” Learn how the U.S. is addressing them from Special Envoy for Global Food Security Dr. Cary Fowler: https://t.co/fwAz0ATZmD

.@StateDeptSpox discusses the news of the collapse of the bridge in India. “The United States stands with our Indian partners and has offered our support to the Government of India.” https://t.co/z0hA9GUD6N

.@StateDeptSpox on the Black Sea Grain Initiative: Russia is again weaponizing food in the war that it started. The most effective step to address the ongoing food security crisis would be for Russia to immediately return to the arrangement and end its war against Ukraine. https://t.co/qRYdhwpCgX
Live now! @statedeptspox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on https://t.co/OfOGTIu3zo. https://t.co/D7i6JsL4GS
Wishing all trick-or-treaters around the world a safe and Happy Halloween. https://t.co/XqvRkH1oHI

In "The Week at State," Secretary Blinken meets with Israeli President Herzog, hosts a Diwali reception, and travels to Canada, where he meets with Prime Minister Trudeau and Foreign Minister Joly. For more, visit https://t.co/58Uc9lZRv7. https://t.co/sCjDVUqZ8o

Department Senior Advisor for Employee Communications Roberta Mather: For the Department to succeed, we need diverse thinkers who see the world with different viewpoints. When we bring all of that here, that becomes the core of diplomacy. #NDEAM https://t.co/xA0OO1Df2H

The United States will continue to step up and assist those who don't have access to enough safe, healthy food. This year alone, we’ve committed over $9 billion in lifesaving humanitarian assistance to address growing needs around the world. Learn more: https://t.co/xzCP3rl4K6. https://t.co/uaY51GRvy3

In the past year, the U.S. upheld its COP26 climate commitments in important ways, including tackling the climate crisis at home and helping countries around the world. Learn why this is a decade of ambition, action, and innovation: https://t.co/dRmW2ivyei.
This October during National Disability Employment Awareness Month, we are honoring Department employees for their countless contributions to diplomacy. #NDEAM https://t.co/SsR5TM3wN6

.@POTUS: “This is a moral imperative, an economic imperative, a moment of peril but also a moment of extraordinary possibilities.” Read about the opportunities at #COP27 to take actions that limit global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. https://t.co/8VWNxuzWuL

With the latest delivery of more than 5 million vaccine Pfizer doses, the United States has now donated, in partnership with #COVAX, more than 40 million doses to Indonesia. We’re committed to helping end the acute phase of the pandemic and to saving lives. https://t.co/RAA80LHBp0

Over 2.3 million Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine doses arrived in Ukraine this past week, bringing the total to over 6.4 million donated. The U.S. is proud to work ​with @gavi ​#COVAX to bring vaccines to countries around the world as we address the​ pandemic together. https://t.co/HMA32OhK7y

Baseball crosses boundaries and inspires millions by demonstrating teamwork, discipline, and sense of community. As the 2022 #WorldSeries kicks off, learn more about our @sportsdiplomacy programs and history of Sports Envoys sharing baseball with the world https://t.co/LHusAeuwmW

In today’s briefing @StateDeptSpox recapped @SecBlinken's trip to Canada, discussed the situation in Haiti, and called on Iranian authorities to immediately release the remains of Reza Haghighatnejad to his family and cease their act of intimidation. https://t.co/JE74hYSLxv

.@SecBlinken: Our two countries are the two most integrated countries in the world, and every single day our people are working together, studying together, visiting together, and that’s having a profoundly positive impact on both countries. https://t.co/hIlB91P6Tg
.@POTUS: Canada and the United States are not only vital partners, we’re NATO Allies committed to shared defense. https://t.co/elaNZviR6S https://t.co/ZdFuzFRAt6

.@POTUS: Canada and the United States will stand together against the abuse of universal rights and democratic freedoms. We’re going to strengthen our shared commitment to providing safe haven for refugees and asylum seekers, and so much more. https://t.co/u9V7bpShuG

.@POTUS: The United States has no closer and no more important friend than Canada. Our nations share a close geography and history that will forever bind us together, but our values are even more consequential. https://t.co/elaNZvijhk https://t.co/japOvFJSyA

.@SecBlinken spoke with @business about Russia, Ukraine, Iran, and China, as well as U.S. foreign policy priorities. Read or watch the interview. https://t.co/PoVNO5lYSC
https://t.co/NhWCa2yrFk

.@SecBlinken with @business: What’s fundamentally motivating us is this strongly held view that we really are at an inflection point, that this is a moment when the post-Cold War era is clearly over, and there is this competition to shape what comes next. https://t.co/PoVNO5lYSC
The United States and Canada are working closely with our partners to achieve stability, safety, and health for Haiti. https://t.co/elaNZvzU8S https://t.co/v7lIJNG19k

At a joint press avail, @SecBlinken and @melaniejoly discussed shared goals, including support for Ukraine, addressing the humanitarian crisis in Haiti, deepening cooperation in the Indo-Pacific and Arctic regions, and advancing cooperation on migration. https://t.co/2AZRSIQEbY
Canada and the United States are each others’ largest export markets, and Canada is the number one export market for more than 30 U.S. states. https://t.co/elaNZvijhk https://t.co/ixY0gLZH76

Today we're announcing Honolulu, Palm Springs, Detroit, and Seattle as sites for the first @apec Senior Officials’ and Ministerial meetings during #USAPEC2023. Each city sets the scene for our theme of “Creating a Resilient and Sustainable Future for All.” https://t.co/AUug3qMT0e

Along with @WAStateGov and @CityofSeattle, we are pleased to announce Seattle as the site of the Third @APEC Senior Officials’ Meeting in 2023. Did you know that Blake Island in Puget Sound, off the coast of Seattle, hosted the first APEC Economic Leaders’ Meeting in 1993? https://t.co/emlWG82eW4
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a joint press availability with Canadian Foreign Minister @melaniejoly in Ottawa, Canada. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/g327Gv7Pg3 https://t.co/eOe1RpoRSB

Today, we mark International Religious Freedom Day and renew our focus on a human right that must never be taken for granted. The United States is committed to seeing that everyone, everywhere can enjoy the right to worship freely. https://t.co/9oUTJXiK2W https://t.co/NddLKbKRz0

The U.S. and Canada share an unwavering commitment to supporting Ukraine and confronting Russia’s invasion of its peaceful neighbor, including through the recent announcement of additional supplies for Ukraine’s brave defenders and assistance resettling Ukrainian refugees. https://t.co/kwED6aRGwV

The United States and Canada have been friends, partners, and allies for more than 150 years, and our bilateral relationship is one of the closest and most comprehensive in the world. https://t.co/elaNZvijhk https://t.co/UVupRrKKhC

Today, we are announcing a joint action with @USTreasury designating 14 Iranian individuals and 3 entities. These newly sanctioned individuals and entities represent a range of those responsible for Iran’s repression. https://t.co/mxL1PRApdc

The goal of @USAID’s $100 million Agricultural Resilience Initiative: to enable Ukraine’s agriculture sector to reach the export levels it recorded before the invasion. Here’s how it will help farmers and get the agricultural economy moving again: https://t.co/539qrOybU4
Live now! @SecBlinken delivers remarks at a Diwali reception at the State Department. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/4l9TG0r5jD. https://t.co/4jIu0YZght

Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming on YouTube at https://t.co/xDnfFhLflx. https://t.co/HYggNBX6iP

Meeting with @IsraelPresident Herzog, @SecBlinken commended the maritime agreement between Israel and Lebanon, raised concerns about and called for de-escalation of violence on the West Bank, and discussed Iran's malign influence in the region and beyond. https://t.co/7s8DiJ8dxx https://t.co/sdXw7lzgBR

The future of technology and the internet should advance freedom and democratic principles — and reflect our shared values with partner nations. Read about the watchdogs who help guard internet access: https://t.co/0D3jaNGlk8
Our work benefits U.S. communities every day. Learn more here: https://t.co/Cxu69G1j2o
Americans and Israelis are united by our shared commitment to democracy, economic prosperity, and regional security. Our partnership has never been stronger. https://t.co/zi6YdDcTE2

On December 13-15, @POTUS will host the U.S.-Africa Leaders Summit in Washington, DC. The Summit will discuss U.S.-Africa relations and shared global priorities and demonstrate the United States’ enduring commitment to Africa. Visit https://t.co/qKdyxs9rH0 for more.

.@POTUS: The future will be won by the countries that unleash the full potential of their populations. The United States will always promote human rights and the values enshrined in the UN Charter in our own country and around the world. https://t.co/DrA8ODOkwG

.@SecBlinken at the @UN Security Council: Tell President Putin to stop the horror he started. Tell him to stop putting his interests above the interests of the rest of the world, including his own people. https://t.co/08zmXfcAGr

Over 4.8 million additional Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine doses arrived in Bangladesh this week. In total, ​the U.S. has now donated over 95 million vaccine doses to Bangladesh, via #COVAX, to stop the further spread of the virus. We thank Bangladesh for its partnership. https://t.co/231Tpi2Klr

.@SecBlinken: President Putin’s declaration of martial law in parts of Ukraine that Russia purports to annex is just his latest attempt to dress up crimes in the language of law. Full remarks: https://t.co/5GwMdAxnpi https://t.co/QWfmswLZh0
How well you know the @UN? On #UNDay, take our quiz to see how the UN came to be and how Russia is now acting against the values it committed to uphold. https://t.co/EVd8iqtzsz

.@SecBlinken on Women in STEM at the 10th anniversary @TechWomen event: “We believe that you, and women like you, can help solve the biggest problems that we have to face on this planet.” https://t.co/Q49M88q2IN

On this #WorldPolioDay, we reaffirm our commitment to saving lives by working to vaccinate everyone. Because every child who receives an immunization get us one step closer to a polio free world. https://t.co/PkNwtOwxUR https://t.co/1C1To7Ptn4

On the 77th #UNDay, the United States reiterates its commitment to promoting human rights and the values enshrined in the @UN Charter at home and around the world. Read the @POTUS Proclamation for more: https://t.co/v0LbHH4QbQ https://t.co/eO0bqjo8dJ
Happy Diwali to all who celebrate the Festival of Lights worldwide. We wish you peace, joy, and prosperity. https://t.co/KI2JL5u6K2

With the most recent delivery of 500,760 COVID-19 vaccine doses, the United States has now donated more than 79 million vaccine doses to Pakistan via #COVAX. This is one of many ways the U.S. and Pakistan work together to support global health and protect the world from COVID-19. https://t.co/SRskpAWMkY

.@SecBlinken on the protests in Iran: This is grassroots. This is bottom up. This is a reflection of huge frustration and huge anger that so many in Iranian society have toward the direction of their country and toward their leadership. https://t.co/Oze4Ro11vv

.@SecBlinken on the protests in Iran: Fundamentally, this is about the Iranian people. It’s about their country. It’s about their future. They will decide it. But we want to demonstrate in both practical as well as rhetorical ways our solidarity with them. https://t.co/oZ8mWQNmKf https://t.co/RXrT2Jz9Ys

As demand for their highly prized fur and bones grows, the poaching of snow leopards is on the rise. The United States supports governments across Central and South Asia to disrupt the illegal trade of snow leopards. #EndWildlifeTrafficking #WorldSnowLeopardDay https://t.co/dWjA2DRgso

“His move also reveals the lie at the heart of Russia’s purported annexation. If 99% of people in these parts of Ukraine want to be part of Russia, why does President Putin need to impose martial law to control them?” - @SecBlinken on President Putin’s imposing of martial law https://t.co/f93wXA3rce

"Vladimir Putin could and should stop this war immediately. He alone chose to start and he alone chooses to continue it, even callously disregarding the mounting costs for his own people." — @StateEUR’s Assistant Secretary Donfried @foreignpressctr https://t.co/TCj1JPeu6V

What were the “referenda” in Russian-occupied areas of Ukraine? A series of staged votes, organized by the Kremlin. The United States will never recognize these illegal attempts to seize territory that does not belong to Russia. https://t.co/Lq52ZXKn2u

This week, the U.S. partnered with #COVAX to donate a total of 1,007,820 COVID-19 vaccines to the people of Lesotho and Rwanda. This brings the total number of vaccine donations to Africa to 186,645,110. We are committed to helping our African partners fight the pandemic. https://t.co/HrwIfSRiIb
